name: hangshun
description: Hangshun is a leading Chinese MCU manufacturer specializing in 32-bit ARM Cortex-M microcontrollers for consumer electronics, industrial control, and IoT applications.
longDescription: Hangshun, founded in 2014 and headquartered in Shenzhen, China, is a professional microcontroller (MCU) design company focusing on 32-bit ARM Cortex-M series products. As an authorized distributor, BeiLuo Electronics provides comprehensive access to Hangshun's MCU portfolio. The company's product line covers general-purpose MCUs, touch control MCUs, motor control MCUs, and wireless connectivity MCUs. Hangshun is committed to providing high-performance, low-power, and cost-effective MCU solutions for consumer electronics, home appliances, industrial control, and IoT applications. With strong R&D capabilities and localized technical support, Hangshun has become one of the fastest-growing MCU brands in China.

certifications.name: ISO 9001
certifications.description: Quality Management System certification ensuring consistent product quality

certifications.name: AEC-Q100
certifications.description: Automotive Electronics Council qualification for automotive applications

seoTitle: Hangshun MCU Distributor | ARM Cortex-M Microcontrollers | BeiLuo
seoDescription: Authorized distributor of Hangshun 32-bit ARM Cortex-M microcontrollers. Technical support and selection guide for general-purpose, touch, motor control, and wireless MCUs.

faqs.question: What types of MCUs does Hangshun offer?
faqs.answer: Hangshun offers four main categories of 32-bit ARM Cortex-M microcontrollers: 1) General Purpose MCU - based on Cortex-M0/M3/M4 cores, frequency up to 168MHz, with rich peripherals including ADC, DAC, timers, UART, SPI, I2C, USB, and CAN; 2) Touch Control MCU - integrated capacitive touch sensing with up to 24 channels, supporting various touch patterns like buttons, sliders, and wheels; 3) Motor Control MCU - dedicated for BLDC and stepper motor control with integrated gate drivers, PWM units, and position detection interfaces; 4) Wireless MCU - integrated BLE 5.0 or Sub-1G wireless connectivity for IoT applications. All MCUs feature low power consumption, wide voltage range (1.8V-5.5V), and industrial-grade temperature range (-40°C to +85°C or +105°C).
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our MCU categories to find general-purpose, touch control, motor control, and wireless MCUs for your application.

faqs.question: How do I select the right Hangshun MCU for my application?
faqs.answer: Selecting the right Hangshun MCU involves evaluating several key parameters: 1) Core and performance - Cortex-M0 for simple applications (up to 48MHz), M3 for medium complexity (up to 72MHz), M4 for DSP/FPU requirements (up to 168MHz); 2) Memory size - Flash from 32KB to 512KB, SRAM from 4KB to 128KB based on code size and data requirements; 3) Peripherals - ensure required interfaces (UART, SPI, I2C, USB, CAN, Ethernet, ADC, DAC) are available; 4) Package - choose from QFN, LQFP, TSSOP packages based on PCB space and manufacturing constraints; 5) Power consumption - select ultra-low power variants for battery applications; 6) Special features - touch sensing for HMI, motor control for drives, wireless for IoT. Use Hangshun's selection guide or contact our FAE team for recommendations based on your specific requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use our MCU selection guide or contact our FAE team with your performance, memory, and peripheral requirements.

faqs.question: What development tools are available for Hangshun MCUs?
faqs.answer: Hangshun provides comprehensive development tools and ecosystem support: 1) IDE support - Keil MDK-ARM, IAR Embedded Workbench, and GCC-based IDEs including STM32CubeIDE; 2) SDK and libraries - HAL (Hardware Abstraction Layer), LL (Low Layer) drivers, and middleware libraries for USB, TCP/IP, RTOS; 3) Evaluation boards - dedicated development boards for each MCU series with onboard debugger; 4) Programmers - HS-Link in-circuit debugger/programmer supporting SWD and JTAG; 5) Software tools - configuration tools for clock, pinmux, and peripheral initialization; 6) Code examples - extensive example code for all peripherals and applications; 7) Technical documentation - datasheets, reference manuals, application notes, and user guides. All tools are available for free download from Hangshun's website. BeiLuo provides local technical support for tool setup and usage.
faqs.decisionGuide: Download Keil/IAR IDEs and Hangshun SDK from official website; contact our FAEs for tool setup support.

faqs.question: How does Hangshun MCU compare with STM32?
faqs.answer: Hangshun MCUs are pin-to-pin and software-compatible with STM32 in many cases, offering several advantages: 1) Cost - typically 20-40% lower price than equivalent STM32 parts; 2) Availability - better supply continuity during market shortages; 3) Local support - Chinese technical support team with fast response; 4) Customization - ability to provide customized features for specific applications; 5) Performance - comparable or better performance in many benchmarks. Key differences: Hangshun focuses on mainstream applications with optimized peripheral sets; STM32 has broader portfolio including high-end series; Hangshun provides better cost-performance ratio for high-volume applications. Migration from STM32 to Hangshun is straightforward due to peripheral compatibility and similar register structures. BeiLuo can provide detailed comparison and migration support.
faqs.decisionGuide: Consider Hangshun for cost-sensitive and high-volume applications; contact our FAEs for migration support from STM32.

faqs.question: What is the quality and reliability of Hangshun MCUs?
faqs.answer: Hangshun MCUs meet high quality and reliability standards: 1) Manufacturing - produced at world-class foundries (TSMC, SMIC) with advanced process nodes (40nm, 55nm, 90nm); 2) Quality certifications - ISO 9001 certified design and quality management systems; 3) Reliability testing - AEC-Q100 Grade 1 qualification for automotive-grade products, including HTOL (High Temperature Operating Life), ESD, and latch-up testing; 4) Production testing - 100% testing at multiple temperature points; 5) Failure rate - typical FIT rate < 50 for industrial-grade products; 6) Longevity commitment - 10+ year product lifecycle guarantee for industrial and automotive products. Hangshun has shipped over 100 million MCUs with field-proven reliability in consumer electronics, home appliances, and industrial applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Hangshun MCUs meet industrial and automotive quality standards; contact us for reliability reports and AEC-Q100 documentation.

faqs.question: Does Hangshun provide motor control solutions?
faqs.answer: Yes, Hangshun offers dedicated motor control MCUs and solutions: 1) Motor control MCU series - integrated gate drivers, PWM units with advanced features (dead-time insertion, fault protection), and analog comparators for overcurrent protection; 2) Supported motor types - BLDC (sensorless and sensored), PMSM (Field Oriented Control), stepper motors (microstepping), and brushed DC motors; 3) Control algorithms - provided as libraries including six-step commutation, FOC, and SVPWM; 4) Development kits - motor control evaluation boards with power stage and motors; 5) Application support - reference designs for fans, pumps, power tools, and servo drives. Key features: Up to 6 PWM channels with 1ns resolution, integrated op-amps for current sensing, and hardware acceleration for motor control algorithms. Power range: from 10W to 2kW depending on external MOSFET selection.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use Hangshun motor control MCUs for BLDC, PMSM, and stepper applications; reference designs available for common motor types.

faqs.question: What touch sensing capabilities do Hangshun MCUs have?
faqs.answer: Hangshun touch control MCUs provide advanced capacitive touch sensing: 1) Touch channels - up to 24 capacitive touch channels per device; 2) Touch patterns - support for buttons, sliders, wheels, and proximity sensing; 3) Sensitivity - adjustable sensitivity to support various overlay materials (glass, plastic, acrylic) up to 5mm thickness; 4) Water rejection - advanced algorithms for reliable operation with water droplets and moisture; 5) Low power - < 10μA per channel in standby mode with wake-on-touch; 6) Response time - < 10ms touch response for real-time applications; 7) ESD protection - ±8kV contact discharge and ±15kV air discharge protection. Applications: home appliance control panels, industrial HMI, consumer electronics, and automotive interiors. Reference designs available for washing machines, air conditioners, and kitchen appliances.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use Hangshun touch MCUs for capacitive touch HMI applications; supports various overlay materials and water rejection.

faqs.question: What wireless connectivity options does Hangshun offer?
faqs.answer: Hangshun provides wireless MCU solutions for IoT applications: 1) BLE 5.0 MCUs - integrated Bluetooth Low Energy 5.0 with 2Mbps high-speed mode, long range (Coded PHY), and extended advertising; 2) Sub-1G MCUs - 433/868/915MHz Sub-1GHz RF for long-range, low-power applications; 3) Protocol stack - provided BLE stack (peripheral/central/broadcaster/observer roles) and proprietary RF protocols; 4) RF performance - BLE: -95dBm sensitivity, 0dBm to +8dBm TX power; Sub-1G: -120dBm sensitivity, +20dBm TX power; 5) Power consumption - BLE: 3mA RX, 4mA TX at 0dBm, < 1μA in deep sleep; 6) Applications - smart home, wireless sensors, remote controls, asset tracking, and industrial monitoring. Development kits include RF evaluation boards and protocol analysis tools.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use BLE 5.0 MCUs for smartphone connectivity; Sub-1G for long-range, low-power sensor networks.
